post.description: Creates the user, their workspace, an OWNER membership and a session in one transaction.
Unknown email and wrong password return the same INVALID_CREDENTIALS response.
post.summary: Log in with email and password

post.description: Returns a new token pair. Replaying a previously rotated token revokes the session.
Idempotent — unknown or already revoked tokens still return 204.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user, active workspace and role
Get the active workspace and the current member role

patch.description: Owner only. Existing enrollments keep their configured currency and price; enrollments without a custom deadline inherit the new default. Creates a WORKSPACE UPDATE audit entry.
patch.summary: Update workspace default currency and cancellation deadline

get.description: Read-only roster; member management is out of scope.
Newest-first, paginated. Supports filtering by entity, entityId, actor, action and a createdAt time range.
get.summary: List workspace audit log entries (owner only)

get.description: Paginated summaries with active enrollment counts and group names. Search covers full name, contacts and Telegram username. state=deleted|all is owner-only.

get.summary: Get a student profile with enrollment summaries

patch.description: PATCH semantics: omitted fields stay unchanged, null clears an optional field. A no-op update creates no audit entry.

delete.description: Irreversible. Removes the student together with its parent links and enrollments. There is no trash and no restore.

get.description: Paginated summaries with each parent’s linked-student roster. Search covers full name, phone and Telegram username. state=deleted|all is owner-only.

get.summary: Get a parent with their linked-student roster

patch.description: PATCH semantics: omitted fields stay unchanged, null clears an optional field. A no-op update creates no audit entry.

delete.description: Irreversible. Removes the parent together with its student links. There is no trash and no restore.

get.description: Paginated; search + status filter. state=deleted|all is owner-only.

delete.description: Hides the teacher from pickers; enrollments/lessons keep the reference.

get.description: Paginated summaries with active student counts. state=deleted|all is owner-only.

get.summary: Get a group with enrollment summaries

patch.description: PATCH semantics: omitted fields stay unchanged, null clears an optional field. A no-op update creates no audit entry.

delete.description: Idempotent. Fails with ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS_EXIST while the group has active or paused enrollments.

get.description: Paginated, newest first, with compact student/group/teacher refs and the effective cancellation deadline. Filterable by student, group, teacher and status. state=deleted|all is owner-only.

post.description: groupId null/omitted creates an individual enrollment. Student, group and teacher must be live records of the current workspace. An indistinguishable live duplicate is rejected with DUPLICATE_ENROLLMENT.
post.summary: Enroll a student with a group or an individual teacher

patch.description: Student, group and teacher are immutable — archive and re-enroll instead. cancellationDeadlineHours null reverts to the workspace default. A no-op update creates no audit entry.
patch.summary: Update enrollment billing rules or lifecycle status

delete.description: Idempotent. For a legitimately ended relationship prefer status=ARCHIVED, which stays visible in history.

post.description: Re-validates duplicate constraints; restoring next to an equivalent live enrollment is rejected with DUPLICATE_ENROLLMENT.

get.description: Returns every non-deleted lesson with startsAtUtc in [from, to).
get.summary: List lessons in a time window (calendar feed)

post.description: startsAt accepts several dates for bulk creation. Overlapping the teacher returns 409 SCHEDULE_CONFLICT unless force=true.
post.summary: Create one or many one-off lessons

patch.description: scope=this detaches and moves a single lesson; scope=this_and_following shifts the series time onward. Conflicts return 409 unless force=true.
Enforces the lesson state machine. Cancelling requires cancelledBy. No ledger effect in Stage 3.

post.summary: Create a recurring pattern and materialize its lessons

patch.description: Changing a schedule field regenerates future SCHEDULED lessons; a price-only change leaves existing lessons untouched.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the pattern and its future scheduled lessons.
